{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = 359th Year of the Damascan Calendar
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The current year is the [[359th Year of the Damascan Calendar]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate events]]
